text:
Sumit worked on Python projects, data science assignments, frontend interfaces, backend application logic, software architecture, performance, and end-to-end development workflows. Technologies included Python, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and data analysis tools.

The provided knowledge base states that he delivered five software solutions that improved project performance by 15% and helped modernize development workflows.

He gained practical experience implementing programming concepts, structuring scalable application logic, debugging, performance optimization, and independently handling project requirements.

## Internshala

Role: Web Developer Intern.

Duration: June 2020-July 2020.

Location: India.

Sumit developed responsive web application interfaces, implemented frontend functionality, and improved UI responsiveness and user experience using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap.

The provided knowledge base states that he built a functional responsive web application within four weeks and increased daily active user engagement by more than 30%.

He learned responsive frontend development, deployment workflows, and cross-device usability optimization.
